name: phase1-dispatch-strategy
description: Phase 1 dispatch: 3 work streams (protocol, templates, core). Protocol and templates dispatched in parallel. Core dispatched after protocol merged (dependency). Merge conflicts on shared config files are expected when multiple branches modify .mulch/mulch.config.yaml or pnpm-lock.yaml — leads spawn merger agents to rebase and resolve.
ov merge fails on .mulch/mulch.config.yaml when multiple branches add domains concurrently. auto-resolve and ai-resolve tiers both fail.
resolution: Nudge lead to spawn merger agent that rebases branch on main and resolves conflicts. Then retry ov merge on the merger branch.
